test.name: Test Web Form Full

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Metropolia\\front-end\\hyte-projekti\\outputs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\d5a6b639-a426-4dd8-a8b5-2217ca16ed22"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'somebody@example.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Hello, Robot Framework! How are you today?' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) 2 by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element [name="my-select"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'New York' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Input Files
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Set Input Files' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Set Input Files' found.

kw.name: Check Checkbox
kw.doc: Checks the checkbox or selects radio button found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Uncheck Checkbox
kw.doc: Unchecks the checkbox found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Set Input Files' found.

suite.name: Entry-Add

kw.name: Avaa selain ja kirjaudu sisään
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Kirjaudu sisään
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'username' into text field 'css:.loginForm input[name=username]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'password' into text field 'css:.loginForm input[name=password]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Contains
kw.msg: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` contains ``text``.
kw.status: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.status: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.
Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC-01 Dialogi avautuu Add a new diary entry -napista
test.doc: Klikataan "Add a new diary entry" -nappia ja varmistetaan, että dialogi aukeaa.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC-02 Onnistunut merkinnän lisääminen kaikilla kentillä
test.doc: Täytetään kaikki lomakekentät ja klikataan Add. Sovellus näyttää onnistumis-alertin joka hyväksytään, minkä jälkeen dialogi sulkeutuu.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC-03 Dialogi suljetaan Close-napilla ilman tallennusta
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC-04 Kaikki lomakekentät löytyvät dialogista
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

test.name: TC-05 Kenttiin voi kirjoittaa tietoja
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Element 'id:loginResponse' did not get text 'Login successful' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
